title: A Normal Day
sentences: I wake up early every morning.
First, I wash my face and brush my teeth.
Then I eat breakfast with my family.
I usually have toast and a cup of tea.
After breakfast, I get dressed for school.
I walk to school with my friend.
School starts and I sit at my desk.
At lunch, I eat with my classmates.
After school, I do my homework.
In the evening, I watch television.
I go to bed at nine o'clock.
